info.description:
The Sketchfab REST API provide access to read and write Sketchfab data. Users are authentified with their Sketchfab API Token or OAuth2 credentials. Responses are formatted in JSON. Inputs are in JSON unless specified otherwise.

## How to make authenticated requests

Some endpoints require users to be authenticated. Users can log in with OAuth2 (preferred), or an API Token.
When an endpoint requires authentication, you need to send an extra HTTP header:

* for OAuth2: `Authorization: Bearer {INSERT_OAUTH_ACCESS_TOKEN_HERE}`
* for API Token: `Authorization: Token {INSERT_API_TOKEN_HERE}`

Some model endpoints referring to password-protected models require a password encoded in base64 in request header: `x-skfb-model-pwd: {base64(THE_PASSWORD)}`

See the [Sketchfab Login (OAuth2) documentation](https://sketchfab.com/developers/oauth) for more information on authentication.

## Pagination

When a request gives many results, results are paginated using cursors.
Each response will contain these fields you can use to make subsequent requests:

* next: full URL containing the next results.
* previous: full URL containing the previous results.
* cursors: an object containing the previous and next cursor that you can use to build the URL to the previous/next results.

By default, pages contain 24 items. You can use the `count` parameter to change the number of items per page. This parameter is capped to 24: it will be ignored if a higher value is passed; the default value will be applied instead.

## Date format

Dates are formatted using the ISO 8601 format.

## Limits and quotas

Calls to the API can be throttled to limit abuse. When your application is being throttled, it will
receive a `429 Too Many Requests` response. This means that you must wait before making more requests.

get.description: Returns the detail of an organization. Can take either the organization UID (orgUid) or name preceded by a @ (@orgName).

patch.description: Returns the detail of an organization. Can take either the organization UID (orgUid) or name preceded by a @ (@orgName).

429.description: Too many requests. You must wait before making requests again.

put.description: Reuploads a model. Accepts multipart/form-data only.

private.description: Sets private (requires a pro plan or higher)

isInspectable.description: Enables 2D view in model inspector. All downloadable models must have isInspectable enabled.

isAgeRestricted.description: Whether the model has restricted content.

password.description: Sets a password (requires a pro plan or higher)

license.description: Sets a license (label). This makes the model downloadable to others. All downloadable models must have isInspectable enabled.

isArEnabled.description: Enables AR for a model (requires a premium plan or higher)

isPublished.description: Sets published after it is processed

modelFile.description: Model archive. Max 50mb for basic users, 200mb for pro users, 500mb for biz users

background.description: Defines the background used. Either a color, a background (uid), an environment (uid) or transparent. eg: {"color": "#ffffff"}, {"environment": "uid"}, {"image": "uid"} or {"transparent": 1}

orientation.description:
Either a 4x4 matrix or an angle with an axis.
eg: {"axis": [1, 1, 0], "angle": 34} or {"matrix": [0.1, 0.2, 0.3 ... ], "axis": [1, 1, 0], "angle": 34.42}

parameters.description: If true, returns all archives flavours, listed by archive type, and sorted by texture resolution (descending). If false, only the texture with the highest reslution is returned for each archive type.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Limit search to a specific period only (in days)

parameters.name: pbr_type
parameters.description: Filter by PBR type. Set to `metalness` to search Metalness/Roughness models only. Set to `specular` to search Specular/Glossiness models only. Set to `true` to search PBR models only. Set to `false` to search non-PBR models only.

parameters.name: rigged
parameters.description: false by default. Set to true to search rigged models only. Set to false to search all models

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: How to sort results. When omitted, results are sorted by relevance

parameters.name: file_format
parameters.description: Searches models by file format. Ex: obj, fbx, blend...

parameters.name: max_filesizes
parameters.description: DEPRECATED: Use available_archive_type and archives_max_size filters.

parameters.name: archives_flavours
parameters.description: If true, returns all archives flavours, listed by archive type, and sorted by texture resolution (descending). If false, only the texture with the highest reslution is returned for each archive type.
